resources.string:
Visit facebook.com/device
on your smartphone or computer
and enter this code
Unexpected error while downloading an image.
New! You\'re in control - choose what info you want to share with apps.
%1$s won\'t work unless you enable Google Play services.
%1$s won\'t run without Google Play services, which are missing from your device.
%1$s is having trouble with Google Play services. Please try again.
%1$s won\'t run without Google Play services, which are not supported by your device.
%1$s won\'t run unless you update Google Play services.
%1$s won\'t run without Google Play services, which are currently updating.
New version of Google Play services needed. It will update itself shortly.
Unable to confirm your phone number
Sorry, we are having trouble sending you a confirmation code.
This code has expired. Please resend confirmation code.
Please check your network and try again.

By tapping %1$sContinue%1$s you are adding this email to your Digits account. All your apps authenticated with Digits will have access to this email address, and their users will be able to discover you by email. Manage your account on %2$sDigits.com%3$s.
By tapping %1$sContinue%1$s above, %2$sDigits by Twitter%3$s will send you an SMS message to confirm your phone number. Message & data rates may apply.
By tapping %1$sCall me%1$s above, %2$sDigits by Twitter%3$s will send you a voice call to confirm your phone number. Call & data rates may apply.

By tapping %1$sContinue%1$s above, you agree to the %2$sTerms of Service%3$s, %2$sPrivacy Policy%3$s, and %2$sCookies Policy%3$s of Digits by Twitter, and that other users of this app can discover you by phone number and/or email.

By tapping %1$sContinue%1$s above, you agree to the updated %2$sTerms of Service%3$s, %2$sPrivacy Policy%3$s, and %2$sCookies Policy%3$s of Digits by Twitter, and that other users of %1$s can discover you by phone number and/or email.
Please check your code and try again.
Please check your email and try again
Please check your number and try again.
Unable to send this number an SMS message.

We use Digits by Twitter to find more of your friends who use this app. When you tap Okay, we\'ll upload your address book to Digits by Twitter so that we can help you find users of %1$s that you know or help other users of %1$s find you.
You have previously set a 2-step verification code on digits.com

Allow %1$s to access the email address associated with your Twitter account @%2$s so that %1$s can use it according to its privacy policy. For example, %1$s could send you updates and other information at that address.
We\'ll configure Solos for your favorite sport first.\nYou can configure and use the other sport mode when you want to.
Finish your activity and Save your ride to view and share your data
Finish your activity and Save your run to view and share your data
When you have recorded your first ride you will be able to view it here.
When you have recorded your first run you will be able to view it here.
Please do not unplug your headset from power during this process
Errors occurred while installing the update.\nYour device could not be recovered.
Errors occurred while installing the update.\nYour device has not been updated.
Please ensure that you have your headset connected to power and that it has at least 50% battery before you begin
During the software upgrade process you will see progress indicated here inside the app\nPlease do not switch off your headset or unplug it from power during this process
Your device battery must be at least %d%% charged in order to continue.
Are you sure you want to delete the ride?
Are you sure you want to delete the run?
Are you sure you want to disconnect your headset?
You can\'t start a Functional Threshold Power test while a ride is in progress. Please stop the ride first.
Are you sure you want to end your Functional Threshold Power test?
You can\'t start a Functional Threshold Power test without a connected power sensor. Please connect the sensor first.
You must enable GPS in order to use navigation.
When you record an activity with Location (GPS) enabled, Solos will track your position even when the app is in the background, or your phone screen is locked.\n\nAllow this?
Are you sure you want to log out?
You have unsynced data are you sure you wish to logout?
GPS location unavailable. Move to an open area and try again
You can\'t start a training workout without a connected %1$s sensor.
Not connected to a Solos headset
We will capture your basic information, such as name and profile picture
Create your profile by logging into \nyour Facebook account for a simpler \nsetup process
You are currently logged into Facebook
Share your ride with your friends and followers
Share your run with your friends and followers
• Functional Threshold Power (FTP) represents your ability to sustain the highest possible power output over 45 to 60 minutes.
• Regular assessments of your FTP give you an indication of whether you are improving your performance.
• Your FTP score is calculated using 95% of your average power across your 20 minute test.
How do we test your Functional Threshold Power?
Solos doesn\'t have access to GPS, please allow this in Settings
Distance, Cadence, Speed, Power, Heart rate
Please sign in to your account again
Sign in or create an account
Version %s available for download and installation on the Headset
Target Average Heart Rate|Target Heart Rate|Average Heart Rate|Heart Rate
Ensure your headset is turned on ready to connect
Check your headset screen for the device status
Connect to your sensors to receive accurate data from your rides
Connect to your sensors to receive accurate data from your runs
Ensure that your ANT+ and Bluetooth sensors are awake
When connecting an ANT+ sensor, hold the headset near the sensor
Login to Amazon to ask Alexa
• It is used to calculate your Heart Rate Zones for an activity.
• The default is calculated using the formula 220 - AGE.
• You can override this with your own value below.
What do we use Max HR for?
Click here to manually edit your result
Click here to enter your Max HR
{0,choice,1#You are the only one in session|1<{0} members in session}
You must have at least one bike
You can not delete selected bike
Connect to your headset to select and view live data from your ride
Connect to your headset to select and view live data from your run
Would you like to set\nup a profile?
Please follow the instructions on your headset
Connect to your sensors to receive accurate data from your rides
Connect to your sensors to receive accurate data from your runs
You have successfully set up Solos
You can choose an activity type for each ride, such road racing, mountain practice, and cyclo-cross.
We use your age to calculate your heart rate training zones.
You can add more bikes later on to keep track of which bike was used on each of your rides.
We use your weight to calculate the calories you have burned.
We will guide you through the setup process
You currently have no saved routes.
Auto-Start off:\nNo speed sensor is connected
There are no cycle routes available
To join and manage groups\n tap the
No Internet connection!\n Please check your settings and try again
You need to be connected to the internet to access Facebook
You need to be connected to the internet to be able to share your activity
There has been a navigation issue. Please restart navigation.
You have no suitable rides recorded
When you have rides recorded with GPS data you will be able to see them here
You have no suitable runs recorded
When you have runs recorded with GPS data you will be able to see them here
Please use the companion\napplication to connect to sensors
Auto-Start on:\nBegin cycling to start your ride
Tap Ready on your app to\nstart your ride
Tap Ready on your app to\nstart your run
Tap Start Ride on your app to\nbegin your ride
Tap Start Run on your app to\nbegin your run
Auto-Start on:\nBegin running to start your run
Unable to remove this ride as it is used for a Ghost Ride.
Unable to remove this run as it is used for a Ghost Run.
The user account has been disabled
The user name or password is incorrect
Use the Solos app to connect to your Solos headset and track your performance data in real-time
Location is required to discover bluetooth devices
Headset name can be up to 30 characters
Tolerance is % variation from the target value to which you wish to be notified
How often do you wish to be notified
Click here to conduct FTP test
Estimated Max HR: %d bpm. Click to set
We use your weight to calculate the calories you have burned
Your last workout was incomplete. What would you like to do?
Password must contain a minimum of 8 characters, \n 1 letter, 1 number and a capital letter
By clicking JOIN NOW you agree to Solos\'
Hey! You\'re not set up for cycling.
Hey! You\'re not set up for running.
Log in below to automatically share your rides to other services:
Log in below to automatically share your runs to other services:

If you have a supported Wear OS watch, you can now use Solos without taking your phone with you on your ride. Find \'Watch Mode\' in Quick Settings on the Ride screen. Our app is now on Google Play. Don\'t forget to install the Solos Wear App from your smartwatch.

If you have a supported Wear OS watch, you can now use Solos without taking your phone with you on your run. Find \'Watch Mode\' in Quick Settings on the Run screen. Our app is now on Google Play. Don\'t forget to install the Solos Wear App from your smartwatch.
Experience Solos\' innovative\n Wear OS feature
Invalid response from server. Please try again later.
This ride was already shared on MapMyFitness.
You must log into %s to be able to share your activity
This ride was already shared on Strava.
This run was already shared on Strava.
There was a problem while checking the upload status
This ride was already shared on TrainingPeaks.
There was a network error while uploading. Please try again later.
Please log in to use the sharing functionality.
Invalid login, please log in again.
There was an error while uploading your ride. Please try again later.
Sign in with a different account
By clicking SIGN IN you agree to Solos\'
Your access has been revoked. Please log in again
This Strava ride is already imported
This Strava run is already imported
CLICK A RIDE TO DOWNLOAD AND IMPORT FROM STRAVA
CLICK A RUN TO DOWNLOAD AND IMPORT FROM STRAVA
Please log in to Strava to see your Strava rides
Please log in to Strava to see your Strava runs
Tap here to search for Headsets.
Tap here to search for Sensors
© %1$s Kopin Software Ltd . All rights reserved.
Copyright © %1$s Kopin Software Ltd . All rights reserved.
No Internet connection!\n Please check your settings and try again
You currently have no saved\n Strava rides
Record a ride and upload it to Strava
You currently have no saved\n Strava runs
Record a run and upload it to Strava
Click on @ %s to open the Workout Builder.Select if you would like the workout to be based on Duration or Distance.
Select how the intensity of the workout will be determined:% Functional Threshold Power. % Maximum Heart Rate. % of Threshold Heart Rate. % Threshold Speed(Pace).
% Functional Threshold Power. % Maximum Heart Rate. % of Threshold Heart Rate. % Threshold Speed(Pace).
Set targets and drag pre-made workout building block templates. Once structured workout is created it can be exported and uploaded here.
Build and Export Workouts Fast.\nMeet Your Goals Even Faster.

The TrainingPeaks Workout Builder allows athletes and coaches to quickly and easily create structured workouts based on distance or duration using power, heart rate, pace, speed, or perceived exertion.
You currently have no saved TrainingPeaks workouts.
Build a workout in TrainingPeaks to view it here.
You have no completed training workouts.
When you have completed your first workout you will be able to view it here.
Currently %1$s workout type is not supported
Ghost ride complete. You finished %s in front of the ghost
Ghost ride complete. You finished %s behind the ghost
Call from %s, press button to accept.
New message from %s, press button to play.
I\'ll guide you through your tasks
Press button to advance when ready.
Auto-start has been disabled because no speed sensor is connected.
Cadence sensor is not connected, all screens relating to cadence will not show.
Are you sure you want to discard the ride?
Are you sure you want to discard the run?
GPS provides inaccurate elevation data. We’ll gather more accurate data after the ride.
No Headset is connected. Go to Settings / Devices / Manage Headset to connect.
Heart rate sensor is not connected, all screens relating to heart rate will not show.
GPS data usage has been disabled within Solos, unable to record your route.
GPS data is disabled on your device, unable to record your route.
Pace sensor is not connected, GPS data will be used.
Pace sensor is not connected and GPS data in Solos is disabled, all screens related to pace will not be shown.
Pace sensor is not connected and GPS data is disabled, all screens related to pace will not be shown.
Power sensor is not connected, all screens relating to power will not show.
Manual screen change selected, but no ANT + remote control available.
One or more of your connected sensors is reporting low battery.
Speed sensor is not connected, GPS data will be used.
Speed sensor is not connected and GPS data in Solos is disabled, all screens related to speed will not be shown.
Speed sensor is not connected and GPS data is disabled, all screens related to speed will not be shown.
Stride sensor is not connected, all screens relating to stride will not show.
Elevation stats will be shown once accurate data is downloaded.

You can now use your Wear OS watch with Solos, allowing you to leave your phone at home while you ride. You can complete a full ride, including capturing GPS and sensor data to get the full Solos experience.

You can now use your Wear OS watch with Solos, allowing you to leave your phone at home while you run. You can complete a full run, including capturing GPS and sensor data to get the full Solos experience.
When you switch into watch mode, your saved sensors will automatically transfer to your watch, and your watch will try to connect to them.
Your saved headset is also automatically connected to your watch. You may have to accept a pairing request if you haven\'t previously connected the headset to your watch.
Rides that you complete on your watch will be synced to your account automatically. Your phone will download those rides so you can view your stats in Activities.
Runs that you complete on your watch will be synced to your account automatically. Your phone will download those runs so you can view your stats in Activities.
To install the Solos Wear App load up Google Play on your Wear OS smartwatch and browse for \'Solos Wearables\'. Select the app and then tap the Install button.
Ride with your wear.\nNot your phone.
Run with your wear.\nNot your phone.
You will have to switch back to phone mode if you want to update sensor or ride settings as you are in watch mode currently
Tap the icon to view hint
To avoid headset and sensor reconnection problems please bring in your smartwatch in range to switch to phone mode
Ride in Progress! Please end your ride before switching to phone mode
Please open the Solos Wear app
